# LinearIssueSensor

Polls Linear's GraphQL API for issues updated since the cursor. Triggers a RunRequest per matching issue. Token-authed.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `sensor_name` | `str` | Unique sensor name. |
| `asset_keys` | `List[str]` | Slash-separated asset keys to materialize when an event matches. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api_key_env_var` | `str` | `"LINEAR_API_KEY"` | Env var with the Linear API key. |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `minimum_interval_seconds` | `int` | `60` | Minimum seconds between sensor evaluations. |
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | 'RUNNING' or 'STOPPED'. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `team_id` | `str` | — | Optional Linear team UUID; omit for all teams. |
| `state_types` | `List[str]` | `['unstarted', 'started']` | Workflow state types to listen for. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example

```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.LinearIssueSensorComponent
attributes:
  sensor_name: linear_active_issues_sensor
  asset_keys: [linear_team_metrics]
  api_key_env_var: LINEAR_API_KEY
  state_types: [started, unstarted]
  minimum_interval_seconds: 300
```

## Requirements

```
requests
```
